task: Built and deployed a four-stage permission gate system to prevent dangerous task injection in unrestricted sessions, added task approval workflow with notification integration, completed Phase 3.5 security hardening with full test coverage, cut first tagged release (v0.1.0) with Homebrew formula and GitHub release, verified end-to-end installation via homebrew-askr tap, extended cross-repo boundary checks to Bash tool calls, and documented real Homebrew installation paths (one-liner and tap-then-install) in the main Install section of README.md.
discussion_summary: Askr has progressed through four major phases: Phase 3 (notifications), Phase 3.5 (permission guard), and Phase 4 (approval workflow) are fully implemented, tested, and documented. The v0.1.0 release cycle was completed with correct tarball sha256, fixed Homebrew formula, and homebrew-askr tap verification. This session rebased and merged parallel work from another agent branch, updating README.md to document the real Homebrew install commands (one-liner `brew install BippinShekar/askr/askr` and tap-then-install form) with a note explaining why bare `brew install askr` doesn't work without homebrew-core inclusion. All 58 tests pass. Two known gaps remain: guard_warning notification type (non-blocking guard warnings) is dead code—never invoked from pre_tool_use.py despite being wired into extension.js—and PreCompact emergency handover still routes through hardcoded boilerplate instead of real LLM handover path.

accomplishments.what: LinkedIn location combobox field filling fixed with city name extraction and fallback retry pattern
Identified root cause of LinkedIn location field failures: full location strings do not trigger city autocomplete dropdown
Implemented two-part fix: prompt instructs extraction of city name from full location string, with retry on failure
Killed orphaned uvicorn process blocking backend logs
Conducted comprehensive security audit of apply agent code generation paths with four hardening fixes against prompt injection attacks
Fixed resume PDF portfolio URL lookup from qa_bank.portfolio_url to application_prefill.answers.portfolio_url
Updated PDF generator to render 'Portfolio' as link label instead of domain URL
Diagnosed Ramp application failure as Ashby spam_warning state (browser fingerprinting-based anti-bot detection)
Implemented spam_warning recovery with 'Learn more' probe to locate submit/submit-again button
Extended spam_warning handling to distinguish overlay banner (resubmit after scroll) vs form replacement (hard refresh required)
Refactored spam recovery strategy to defer spam-flagged jobs to end of session instead of inline retry
Investigated queue drain architecture and browser_stream replay buffer lifecycle
Implemented permission_gate.py to detect dangerous permissions (skip-permissions, unrestricted Bash, rm in allow list)
Implemented session_start.py to hold queued tasks instead of auto-injecting when dangerous permissions detected
Wired task_approval_pending notification type into Cursor extension.js for IDE popup rendering
Extended cross-repo boundary checks to Bash tool calls in guard_runner.py
Documented real Homebrew installation paths in README.md (one-liner tap command and tap-then-install form)
Rebased and merged parallel agent branch work on README documentation with Bash-boundary hardening commits

next_actions.action: Implement guard_warning invocation path in pre_tool_use.py to fire non-blocking guard warnings (type: guard_warning) for permission violations that do not require blocking, enabling Phase 3.5's IDE popup for non-blocking warnings
next_actions.why: guard_warning notification type is wired into extension.js but dead code—never invoked from pre_tool_use.py, making non-blocking guard warnings unreachable today

next_actions.action: Fix PreCompact emergency handover in checkpoint.py (create_checkpoint function, trigger_type==emergency branch) to route through real LLM handover path instead of hardcoded boilerplate
next_actions.why: Emergency handovers currently bypass the proper LLM handover mechanism, reducing context quality and consistency

decisions.decision: Homebrew installation requires users to either run one-liner `brew install BippinShekar/askr/askr` or manually add tap then install; bare `brew install askr` is not documented as viable path
decisions.reason: Bare `brew install askr` requires homebrew-core inclusion, which is not realistic for new projects; documented paths reflect actual working installation methods

user_rejected_decisions.what_was_proposed: Post about Homebrew support going live with engagement language (e.g., 'brew tap now live 🎉')
user_rejected_decisions.user_signal: brother nobody knows I am building yet, and that tweet makes it look like I am ready to launch and enable brew install

relational_files.why: Contains HOOK_MAP and guard invocation logic; guard_warning type needs to be invoked here
Implements guard_warning notification path that is currently dead code
Whitelist for guard_warning notification type is already in place; waiting for pre_tool_use.py to invoke it
Contains create_checkpoint function with hardcoded emergency handover boilerplate that needs real LLM path
